message:
fix(fcp-streaming): saturate reconnect attempt counter to prevent overflow bypass br-2ot4f

record_failure() used unchecked += which could wrap from u32::MAX to 0,
resetting the retry budget and allowing unlimited reconnection cycles.
Switched to saturating_add to cap at u32::MAX permanently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
